creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported with a few changes: 
- Distfile changed without version update; new distfile incorporates 
provided patch, so it's removed. 
- Shortened pkg/PLIST 
- Other portlintage 
- Patched Makefiles to respect CC, CFLAGS, etc. 
Thanks!
